content.headline: Discover the Best AI Tools, Curated for You
content.subtitle: AI Hunt finds, tests, and ranks the world's most powerful AI tools — so you always work with the best, first.

features.title: Curated by Experts
features.description: Every tool is tested and ranked by real AI practitioners, not algorithms.

features.title: Updated Daily
features.description: New breakthroughs added the moment they launch, so you're never behind.

features.title: Trusted Worldwide
features.description: Join a fast-growing community that discovers AI tools first.

benefits.title: Save Time
benefits.description: Skip the noise. Find the right tool in seconds, not hours.

benefits.title: Stay Ahead
benefits.description: Use tools your competitors haven't discovered yet.

benefits.title: Zero Guesswork
benefits.description: Transparent rankings based on real performance, not hype.

faq.question: Is AI Hunt free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Browsing and discovering AI tools on AI Hunt is completely free.

faq.question: How do you choose which tools to feature?
faq.answer: Every tool is evaluated by our team against performance, reliability, and real-world value before it's listed.

faq.question: How often is the list updated?
faq.answer: Daily. Our team reviews new AI releases every day to keep the list current.

content.privacyText: نحن في AI Hunt نلتزم بالتعامل مع بياناتك بمسؤولية وشفافية تامة.
